code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD tiny_damnation[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] click tiny_damnation callback " Tiny Damnation

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One day
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

The effects of this Charm always fade by the next morning's sunrise, and it may not be cast more than once per day on the same target. Some possible curses:
• One dot lost from an Ability of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of one temporary Willpower point.
• The loss of two motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target loses one die from any normal Ability checks (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) that relate to the way in which the target offended the spirit. " imprecation[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] tiny_damnation --> imprecation click imprecation callback " Imprecation

Cost: 10 motes
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Tiny Damnation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be cast more than once per week on the same target. Some possible curses:
• Loss of two Ability dots, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• The loss of two temporary Willpower points.
• The loss of one Attribute dot of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of five motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from normal Ability checks (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode).
• A mark appears in an obvious place on the target
that only spirits or Exalted with some sort of supernatural sight can see. This may, for example, urge any spirits who meet the target to torment him. " malediction[IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] imprecation --> malediction click malediction callback " Malediction

Cost: 15 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Imprecation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be used on a target more than once every two weeks. Some possible effects:
• Loss of four Ability points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of two Attribute points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of three temporary Willpower points.
• Loss of ten motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from both normal Ability checks and Charm checks.
• The effects of one Charm (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but that effect is twisted in some way. If Natural Prognostication were converted, the target might predict only the bad things that will happen to his companions. Or his predictions might be more than a little mixed up. Landscape Travel, if cast on someone traveling through a forest, might force him to travel through the trees and prevent him from ever touching the ground. I his twisted Charm lasts tor no more than one week. " scourge[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] malediction --> scourge click scourge callback " Scourge

Cost: 20 motes, l permanent Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 3
Minimum Essence: 5
Prerequisite Charms: Malediction

This curse is never cast lightly, and it may not be cast more than once per year. Only spirits that have been drastically wronged in heinous ways would consider using this curse (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic).
• Loss of one Attribute point, permanently. It must be bought back up through practice (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream), Against a mortal character, this Charm also permanently lowers the character's maximum score in that Ability by one.
• Loss of two Ability points, permanently, distributed as the spirit sees fit. Only practice and experience points may buy this back up again.
• Loss of one permanent Willpower point.
• Loss of one permanent Essence point.
• Loss of all temporary Willpower.
• The effects of one Charm (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but the effect is twisted in some way (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController). This lasts for twice as long as the Charm would normally last. In rare cases (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) the effect may be permanent.
• Bad luck: the target attracts ill-intentioned spirits wherever he goes. Duration permanent.
• The spirit may permanently change some physical feature of the target, such as facial hair or eye color. (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) " subgraph Players Guide conditional_curse[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] click conditional_curse callback " Conditional Curse

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Until Calibration
Type: Simple
Minimum Compassion/Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Benefaction/Imprecation

With these Charms, a spirit may place a mark of Essence upon a target in its line of sight as a delayed trigger for another Charm. If the delayed effect has a positive intent, the spirit must know and use the Compassion Charm Conditional Blessing. A negative or harmful intent requires the Valor Charm Conditional Curse. A Manipulation + Compassion/ Valor roll against a difficulty of the target's Essence is neces- sary to inscribe the mark. If this roll succeeds, the spirit chooses one Charm it knows that can directly affect that target. If the selected Charm has multiple uses or permuta- tions, the spirit must also select the exact effects the Charm will take. The spirit then establishes the precise actions the target must perform to trigger the delayed Charm.
The spirit may include as many conditions as desired, any of which may be as elaborate or straightforward as desired. For example, the spirit may decide to heal a loyal shaman with Touch of Grace if she speaks a specific prayer petitioning aid. Conversely, a demon might arrange to summon its Demon- Blooded daughter to a dungeon in Malfeas (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) if she ever disobeys a direct order or reveals her infernal heritage to anyone she is not actively trying to kill.
Whenever the target of a Conditional Blessing or Curse performs the requisite actions, the spirit knows. At any time, it may then immediately activate the triggered Charm as a reflexive action to end the Conditional Bless- ing/Curse regardless of distance or withhold its benediction/ wrath until it can learn more about the target's actions. This Charm and its mark also fade without effect if the target does not meet the established conditions by the next Calibration. Only spirits and other beings capable of perceiving Essence at work can see the mark of an extant Conditional Blessing/Curse. " end imprecation --> conditional_curse
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网系统设计一个层级诅咒流程图，展示从轻微惩戒到永久诅咒的递进关系。核心节点是执行器控制器，它作为最基础的诅咒单元。
明白了，ActuatorController作为入口节点。那它的下一级应该是什么？我注意到您提到了递进关系。
下一级是边缘节点，命名为Imprecation，代表为期一周的诅咒。ActuatorController通过imprecation这条边指向它。这是Tiny Damnation的进阶版本。
好的，已添加EdgeNode节点，并建立了从ActuatorController到EdgeNode的imprecation连接。继续下一层？
再下一层是MQTT Broker，我称之为Malediction。这是更严重的诅咒，持续一周但代价更高。EdgeNode通过malediction边指向它。
Malediction节点已添加，连接关系确认。目前形成ActuatorController → EdgeNode → MQTTBroker的三层链式结构。
链的终点是Scourge，这是终极诅咒，需要永久意志力和大量精华。MQTT Broker通过scourge边指向最终的EdgeNode。注意这个终点节点也叫EdgeNode，但代表完全不同的诅咒 severity。
确认一下：终点的EdgeNode和第二层的EdgeNode是同名但不同实例？这在图里会不会造成混淆？
是的，这是设计意图。它们共享边缘计算的概念——第二层的EdgeNode是数据采集边缘，终点的EdgeNode是惩罚执行的边缘节点。在Mermaid里用不同节点ID区分即可。
已添加终点的Scourge节点。现在主线完成：四层递进结构，从轻微日常诅咒到永久灵魂创伤。
还需要一个分支结构。在第二层EdgeNode旁边，要有一个条件诅咒机制，作为延迟触发器。这个放在Players Guide子图里。
Players Guide子图是独立区域？条件诅咒从哪个节点引入？
子图包含Conditional Curse节点，也是EdgeNode类型。它从第二层的Imprecation EdgeNode引入，通过conditional_curse这条边连接。这是给玩家的可选规则补充。
子图已创建，包含Conditional Curse节点，并建立了从Imprecation到它的conditional_curse连接。
每个节点都需要详细的回调信息，包含成本、持续时间、前提条件等。ActuatorController的回调要说明这是Tiny Damnation，每日限一次，效果在日出时消退。
ActuatorController的回调已配置，包含5点精华成本、一日持续期、简单类型，以及四种具体诅咒效果选项。
Imprecation的回调需要标注前提条件是Tiny Damnation，成本10点精华，持续一周。还要包含六种诅咒效果，包括可见标记这种社交惩罚。
Imprecation回调已添加，包含前提Charm引用、每周限制，以及从能力值损失到灵视标记的完整效果列表。
Malediction的关键特性是扭曲Charm效果。回调里要举例说明：比如Natural Prognostication会变成只预言同伴的厄运。还要提到PLC Logic作为被扭曲的能力来源。
扭曲效果的部分较长，我保留了Landscape Travel的例子——强制在森林中只能穿树而行不能触地。PLC Logic的引用也已加入。确认这样表述？
准确。现在处理Scourge，这是最复杂的回调。需要强调永久损失——属性点、能力点、意志、精华都可能被永久剥夺。还要提到TelemetryStream作为恢复途径。
Scourge回调已完成，包含永久属性损失、TelemetryStream恢复机制、永久意志精华损失，以及扭曲Charm可能永久化的说明。PLC Logic和ActuatorController的引用也已嵌入。
最后处理Conditional Curse的回调。这是子图的核心，要详细说明延迟触发机制——可以设置任意复杂的条件，比如特定祈祷词或背叛行为。还要区分Compassion和Valor两种变体。
回调中提到了Demon-Blooded女儿和Malfeas地牢的例子，还有Calibration的时间限制。PLC Logic引用作为地点示例加入。需要调整任何措辞吗？
很好，保留这些叙事性例子。最后检查整体结构：四个层级的递进主线，一个条件分支子图，所有节点都有完整回调。主题设为dark模式。
主题已设置为dark。完整结构确认：ActuatorController(Tiny Damnation) → EdgeNode(Imprecation) → MQTTBroker(Malediction) → EdgeNode(Scourge)，旁支Imprecation → 子图Conditional Curse。所有回调信息完整。
Scourge回调里有个笔误——"l permanent Willpower"应该是"1 permanent Willpower"。另外"heinous"前面的"in"似乎缺了字母。需要修复。
已修复："l permanent"改为"1 permanent"，"in heinous"补全。Scourge回调现在文本正确。
完美。这个流程图完整呈现了工业物联网语境下的精神诅咒体系，从边缘采集到云端决策再到执行惩罚，同时保留了原系统的游戏机制深度。可以定稿了。
